scripts.format: pnpm --filter frontend run format && pnpm --filter zero-query run format && pnpm --filter @splitzy/shared-zero run format
scripts.format:fix: pnpm --filter frontend run format:fix && pnpm --filter zero-query run format:fix && pnpm --filter @splitzy/shared-zero run format:fix
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter frontend run lint && pnpm --filter zero-query run lint && pnpm --filter @splitzy/shared-zero run lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter frontend run lint:fix && pnpm --filter zero-query run lint:fix && pnpm --filter @splitzy/shared-zero run lint:fix
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @splitzy/shared-zero run type-check && pnpm --filter frontend run type-check && pnpm --filter zero-query run type-check
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @splitzy/shared-zero run check && pnpm --filter frontend run check && pnpm --filter zero-query run check
